name: Lisa Lampanelli
bio: Lisa Lampanelli, born Lisa Lampugnale, is an American former stand-up comedian and insult comic nicknamed the Queen of Mean. She became widely known for her appearances on the Comedy Central Roasts and released several specials and albums, with Back to the Drawing Board nominated for a Grammy. She retired from stand-up in 2018 to work as a coach and storytelling teacher.

timeline.ev: Comedy Central special Dirty Girl aired
Comedy Central special Tough Love aired

accolades: Grammy nomination, Best Comedy Album (Back to the Drawing Board)
Recurring roaster on the Comedy Central Roasts
